headline: Is It Time To Reconsider General Motors (GM) After Its 1 Year 67% Share Price Surge
summary: If you are trying to figure out whether General Motors stock is attractively priced or starting to look stretched, the recent share moves and current valuation metrics give you a lot to work with. The stock recently closed at US$78.41, with returns of 2.0% over 7 days, 7.8% over 30 days, a 3.2% decline year to date, 67.3% over 1 year and 144.3% over 3 years. This gives you several different entry points to think about. Recent market attention has been driven by ongoing updates around General...
